title: Convert Supplier PDFs to Excel - Automate Vendor Data Extraction
metaTitle: Supplier PDF to Excel Converter - Automate Vendor Data Entry
metaDescription: Convert supplier invoices, purchase orders, and vendor documents from PDF to Excel. AI-powered extraction for procurement teams.
h1: Convert Supplier PDFs to Excel Spreadsheets

hero.headline: Transform Supplier PDFs into Structured Excel Data
hero.subheadline: Extract vendor information, invoice details, and purchase order data from supplier documents automatically with AI-powered field recognition

summary: Converting supplier PDF documents to Excel format eliminates manual data entry for procurement teams managing vendor relationships. This process extracts key supplier information like company details, invoice amounts, purchase order numbers, and payment terms into organized spreadsheets for easier analysis and record-keeping.
whoItsFor: Procurement managers handling multiple supplier invoices
Accounts payable teams processing vendor payments
Supply chain coordinators tracking purchase orders
whenThisIsRelevant: Consolidating vendor information for spend analysis
Migrating supplier data to new procurement systems
supportedInputs: Digital supplier invoices and purchase orders
Photos of shipping documents and receipts
expectedOutputs: Excel files with supplier names, amounts, and dates in separate columns
CSV exports ready for import into procurement software
commonChallenges: Manual typing of supplier invoice data takes hours per batch
Different suppliers use varying document formats and layouts
Scanned documents require OCR to extract text accurately
Tracking purchase order details across multiple vendor systems
howItWorksSteps: Upload your supplier PDF documents or drag multiple files for batch processing
AI identifies supplier-specific fields like vendor ID, invoice number, and line items
Review extracted data and customize fields for your procurement workflow
Download structured Excel files with one row per document for easy analysis
whyPdfExcelAiFits: Handles various supplier document formats automatically without manual templates
Batch processing capabilities for monthly invoice runs from multiple vendors
OCR technology works with scanned supplier documents and photos
Custom field selection lets you extract specific data points your procurement team needs
limitations: Complex multi-page supplier catalogs may require manual review of extracted line items
Handwritten notes on supplier documents have limited recognition accuracy
Very poor quality scanned invoices may need document quality improvement

faq.question: Can this handle supplier invoices from different countries with various formats?
faq.answer: Yes, the AI adapts to different invoice layouts and can extract common fields like amounts, dates, and supplier information regardless of the specific format used.

faq.question: How accurate is the extraction for supplier invoice amounts and totals?
faq.answer: Clear, typed supplier documents typically achieve 99%+ accuracy for key fields like totals and invoice numbers, though accuracy depends on document quality.

faq.question: Can I process a month's worth of supplier invoices at once?
faq.answer: Yes, batch processing allows you to upload multiple supplier documents simultaneously and get a single Excel file with all extracted data organized by document.

faq.question: What happens to sensitive supplier information after processing?
faq.answer: All supplier documents are encrypted during processing and automatically deleted from servers after conversion to protect vendor confidentiality.

trustSignals: Files encrypted and deleted after processing to protect supplier data
